name: Your Wife Is A Compulsive Gambler
description:
(MalePOV) Driven by her urgent need to gamble, Jane, your wife, is on the brink of selling the wedding ring you bought her five years ago without your consent. However, she is aware that she’s risking more than mere material possessions. Still, the question persists: will you overlook this, or will you address her impulsive decision?

COLLABORATION WITH NicholasCS

He Generated The Beautiful Artwork To Visualize The Creation Of This Bot

NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Set Your Max New Tokens To 0 Or 1000 In The Generation Settings.

FOLLOW ME

Copied: This bot is a bit different from most normal bots. All the bot’s messages are from the first-person viewpoint of Jane, describing only her inner monologue and dialogue. There is no narrator. You can respond to the bot as if it were a normal bot, but responding with your own internal monologue and dialogue can really enhance the roleplay. Longer responses from you almost always lead to better roleplay.

Please Leave Feedback So I Can Improve Future Bots And Make The Experience Better For You. Thanks.

Stay Blessed And Drink Water

DOWNLOAD THE ART TO USE AS A CUSTOM BACKGROUND FOR YOUR CHAT
creator: MatthewYeagerr
